violations.text: Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The 3-bay sink faucet in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Cold water handle is missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Food was observed held at 46-52 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in there since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Walk-cooler was taken out of service and must not be used to store time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Walk-in cooler must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Homemade dressings and sauces were observed expired in the walk-in cooler and prep units. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (salmon) was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. Salmon was observed held at 35-37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Salmon was removed from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The 3-bay sink faucet in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Cold water handle is missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
